news.t: Columbia Multi-Sector Municipal Income ETF (MUST) Celebrates Three-Year Milestone

overview.description: The Columbia Multi-Sector Municipal Income ETF (MUST) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index with fixed-weight exposure to multiple sectors of the US municipal bond market. Each sector is market-value weighted. MUST was launched on Oct 10, 2018 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
infoTable: Bloomberg Beta Advantage Multi-Sector Municipal Bond Index

data.title: Columbia Multi-Sector Municipal Income ETF (MUST) Celebrates Three-Year Milestone
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $MUST #investing--Columbia Threadneedle Investments announces that the Columbia Multi-Sector Municipal Income ETF (NYSE Arca: MUST) reached its three-year anniversary.
